DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Morando of Farella, Braun & Martel LLP telephone number 415-954-4457 for Plaintiff 731 Market Street Owner LLC.
Thomas Lakritz of Office of the City Attorney telephone number 415-554-3963 for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court changed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled as to both causes of action. The City has not shown as a matter of law that the tax payer is not entitled to some or all of the refund the tax payer seeks. Mr. Morando is to prepare a form of order and show compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Kelley Anne DeYoung, CSR #6780. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Continued To Nov-17-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to November 17, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Department 302 to give plaintiff 731 Market Street Owner LLC an opportunity, if it chooses, to respond to the arguments raised for the first time in the City's reply memorandum. Plaintiff may file a supplemental opposition memorandum no later than November 10, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Kelley De Young, CSR #6780. (302/HK)
